Speaker introduction

About Mark Ross

1

Enterprise foundation  ·  30+ years in IT

Built the automation function at a global packaging manufacturer from the ground up

Took a blank page and built a Centre of Excellence — strategy, tooling, delivery, governance. 120+ automations across finance, procurement and supply chain. Real scale. Real outcomes.

2

Founded InnovateInDigital  ·  18 months ago

Invite-only practitioner roundtables — and working AI tools built without writing a single line of code

Productised that experience into 7 live AI-powered tools for SMBs. Runs a community of senior practitioners — quarterly invite-only roundtables, an Agentic AI Dev WhatsApp group, and SwissBorg Zurich Ambassador. Real experience shared, not polished presentations.

The Starting Point

Where I Started

The Frustration

  • 1.Drag-and-drop website builders
  • 2.Templates that never quite fit
  • 3.No real control over the output
  • 4.Looked like everyone else's site
  • 5.Zero ability to build actual apps

The Question I Asked

"Cool websites and real applications exist everywhere. People are building them. How hard can it actually be?"

The answer changed everything.

The Realisation

The Mindset Shift

This is not a coding problem.
It's a thinking problem.
01
Strategic Thinking
Know what you want to build and why. Define the problem clearly before asking for a solution.
02
Know What to Ask
You don't need to understand the code. You need to describe your problem in plain English.
03
Use the Right Tools
The tools exist. They're free or near-free. You just need to know which ones to reach for.

The Toolkit

The Tools That Made It Possible

Claude AI
The Developer
Describe what you want in plain English. It writes the code, iterates with you, and explains what it built.
GitHub
Version Control
Every version stored. Free. The bridge between your files and the live app.
Vercel
Deployment
Push to GitHub. App rebuilds and redeploys in ~30 seconds. Free.
Formspree
Lead Capture
Form on app → email in inbox. No backend. No server.
Google Domains
Your Address
Professional URL. The only cost. ~£12/year.

Live at innovateindigital.com

The Workflow

How I Actually Build

1
Think
What problem am I solving? Who uses it? What does success look like?
2
Plan
Describe the app in plain English. Features, flows, outputs. No jargon needed.
3
Vibe Code
Paste the plan into Claude. Review the output. Ask for changes. Repeat.
4
Test
Does it work? Does it break? Ask Claude to fix what's wrong. Iterate fast.
5
Deploy
Push to GitHub. Vercel deploys in 30 seconds. Share the URL. Done.

Case Study 01

The Automation Manager

What It Does

  • ▸Business users log candidate automation processes
  • ▸AI scores each for feasibility and complexity
  • ▸Flags red flags — SSO, external sites, low volume
  • ▸Recommends the right platform — UiPath, Power Automate, SS&C BluePrism…
  • ▸Applies real-world delivery adjustments, not vendor hype

What makes this different

The AI is the engine. 8+ years of real delivery experience is the intelligence behind it. The scoring, the red flags, the adjustments — that's not generic AI. That's IP.

Access model

Community members only. Dedicated access codes.

Case Study 01  ·  Output

The Automation Manager — Analysis Results

5 processes analysed  ·  Hours saved claimed vs realistic  ·  Priority matrix  ·  Automation scores at a glance

Case Study 01  ·  Output

Automation Scores & Priority Matrix

Case Study 02

The Process Prioritisation Matrix

What it shows

Every process plotted by impact vs complexity. Quick Wins, Big Bets, Consider Later, Deprioritise — instantly visible. No spreadsheet needed.

The output

Ranked priority order with automation scores. Ready to act on. Top processes fed straight back into the Automation Manager for detailed analysis.

Case Study 03

The Agentic Trading App

A personal project. Built the same way — no prior trading systems experience.

4-Layer Strategy

Regime → Trend → Entry → Risk. Each layer filters the signal. Claude analyses and fires the call.

Live Signal Generation

Analyses market conditions in real-time. Generates directional signals with confidence scores and entry, stop, and target levels.

Risk Management Built In

Position sizing, stop-loss, and take-profit enforced automatically. Max loss defined before any trade fires.

The point

Same tools. Same process. Zero prior knowledge of trading systems.

Claude Agent v2  ·  Live

The Takeaway

What This Means for Business Leaders

01
The barrier has collapsed
Technical skill is no longer the gating factor for building digital products. Strategic thinking and domain expertise are what matter now.
02
Your industry knowledge is the asset
You know your processes, your clients, your pain points. That knowledge — encoded into an application — is a competitive moat AI can't replicate.
03
Speed is the new differentiator
From idea to live application in days, not months. The organisations that move fast will own the advantage.

The question isn't whether AI can help your business. It's whether you'll move before your competitors do.
